song.title: Jesus the Very Thought of Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, the very thought of Thee With sweetness fills my breast; But sweeter far Thy face to see, And in Thy presence rest.
[V2] 2) Nor voice can sing, nor heart can frame, Nor can the mem’ry find A sweeter sound than Thy blest name, O Savior of mankind!
[V3] 3) O hope of every contrite heart, O joy of all the meek, To those who fall, how kind Thou art! How good to those who seek!
[V4] 4) But what to those who find? Ah, this nor tongue nor pen can show; The love of Jesus, what it is None but His loved ones know.
[V5] 5) O Jesus! light of all below! Thou fount of life and fire! Surpassing all the joys we know, And all we can desire.
[V6] 6) No other source have we but Thee, Soul-thirst to satisfy. Exhaustless spring! the waters free! All other streams are dry.
[V7] 7) Jesus, our only joy be Thou, As Thou our prize wilt be; Jesus, be Thou our glory now, And through eternity.
song.author: Bernard of Clairvaux
